description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular body with a dark, metallic finish and reinforced bands encircling the main receiver. The barrel is elongated and appears to be constructed from metal, with a slightly textured surface and a visible muzzle at the front. The stock is straight and solid, extending from the rear of the receiver, and is likely made of metal or a composite material. The fore-end is compact, with a pair of metallic prongs or spikes protruding beneath the muzzle, suggesting a tactical or breaching function. There are visible mechanical components, such as a trigger guard and a possible loading port, as well as a side-mounted lever or handle. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A rugged, angular shotgun with a dark metallic body, reinforced bands, and a straight stock. Features include a long barrel, tactical prongs at the muzzle, and visible mechanical components.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the straight stock, reinforced receiver, and pronged muzzle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle with its prongs and the compact, angular receiver profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, stock, and the arrangement of mechanical bands and prongs.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock end and the alignment of the receiver, with prongs and barrel visible at the far end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, elongated with visible prongs at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a reinforced appearance
